nodes.name: W. E. Clyde Todd
nodes.summary: W. E. Clyde Todd是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive-green tyrannulet、Zimmer's tody-tyrant、Amazonian scrub flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: Zimmer's tody-tyrant
nodes.summary: Zimmer's tody-tyrant（Zimmer's tody-tyrant，学名 Hemitriccus minimus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Blackwater river
nodes.summary: Blackwater river是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Rufous potoo、橙頂侏儒鳥、Yellow-crested manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴西

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Zimmer's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus minimus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits stunted forest on sandy, nutrient-poor, soil in blackwater areas and to a lesser extent in terra firme forest along ridgetops

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits stunted forest on sandy, nutrient-poor, soil in blackwater areas and to a lesser extent in terra firme forest along ridgetops

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The species is sensitive to human disturbance and is suffering from widespread deforestation in Pará, Amazonas and particularly Mato Grosso, which has increased markedly since the 1960s due to road building, ranching, smallholder agriculture, mining and hydroelectric development." It is considered overall uncommon and very local but locally fairly common in Peru. It is found in several national parks and other protected areas
